zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohesia Valognes於1282年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親Robert Valoignes57歲，母親Eve de Criketot24歲。她於1305年與Edmund Pakenham在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1352年12月14日在她的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohesia Valognes于1282年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲Robert Valoignes57岁，母亲Eve de Criketot24岁。她于1305年与Edmund Pakenham在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1352年12月14日在她的家乡享年70岁。

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohesia Valognes was born in 1282, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Valoignes, was 57 and her mother, Eve de Criketot, was 24. She married Edmund Pakenham in 1305, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died on 14 December 1352, in her hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohesia Valognes est née en 1282, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Valoignes, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Eve de Criketot, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Pakenham en 1305, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1352, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohesia Valognes 1282 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Valoignes 57 und ihre Mutter Eve de Criketot 24. Sie hat 1305 in England, United Kingdom Edmund Pakenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1352 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohesia Valognes è nata il nel 1282 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Valoignes, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Eve de Criketot, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Pakenham nel 1305, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 14 dicembre 1352, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.Cley next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 클리 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Rohesia Valognes(이)가 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Valoignes(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve de Criketot(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Edmund Pakenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 12월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohesia Valognes nasceu em 1282, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Valoignes, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Criketot, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Pakenham em 1305, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1352, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.Cley next the Sea, Norfolk, England: кли некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohesia Valognes родилась в 1282 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Valoignes было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve de Criketot, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Pakenham в 1305 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла 14 декабря 1352 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.
